mapper.sql: id, plan_id, patient_id, medication_compliance, symptom_feedback, side_effects, recovery_status, ai_assessment, next_follow_up_date, remark, record_time, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_follow_up_record WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY record_time DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT FROM ai_follow_up_record WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY record_time DESC, create_time DESC
